meta.title: Connor Douglas
meta.description: PhD candidate at NYU Stern studying machine learning, experimentation, personalization, and markets.

header.name: Connor Douglas
header.subtitle: PhD Candidate, Technology, Operations & Statistics • NYU Stern School of Business

quick.label: Bio
quick.value: PhD candidate in Technology, Operations & Statistics at NYU Stern.

research.intro: My research lies at the intersection of machine learning and economics, where I am especially interested in algorithmic decision making. I study the design and evaluation of these systems, with methodological interests largely in adaptive experimentation and causal inference. More substantively, I am especially interested in applications to personalization, markets, and multi-agent systems.
